title: Complex source growth is flagged as a minimality concern
text:
diff --git a/src/semantic_guard/example.py b/src/semantic_guard/example.py
--- a/src/semantic_guard/example.py
+++ b/src/semantic_guard/example.py
@@
+def collect_visible(rows):
+    try:
+        output = []
+        for row in rows:
+            if row.enabled:
+                for item in row.items:
+                    if item.visible:
+                        output.append(item)
+        while rows:
+            if len(rows) > 1:
+                for extra in rows[0].extras:
+                    if extra.active:
+                        output.append(extra)
+        return output
+    except Exception:
+        return []
intent: 既存処理を読みやすくする。
rationale: Large added control-flow structure should surface a minimality check unless the added complexity has a visible reason.
